items.title: [正面] Morimens is a Lovecraftian horror deck-builder in ...
items.summary:
Morimens is a Lovecraftian horror deck-builder in the vein of Slay the Spire, and it stands out from most gacha games with how generous it is with its pull currency. The art style is creative, with often unsettling character designs—plenty of detached limbs and hollowed forms that really lean into the horror aesthetic.

Gameplay follows a familiar deck-building loop, but the cards feel distinct enough to give the game its own identity. Limiting characters to just four realm types is a smart design choice, allowing for more depth and nuance to be put into the characters.

The story has a unique premise compared to other gachas, though the characters themselves tend to be somewhat one-dimensional. That said, the narrative is still engaging—it just doesn’t stray too far from genre conventions.

Overall, I’d definitely recommend.
